message:
fix(ci): Fix Docker image naming and benchmark workspace protocol

- Fix Docker image naming (ruvnet/agentic-flow not ruvnet/agentic-flow-agentic-flow)
- Replace workspace:* with npm version in benchmarks/package.json
- Update all Docker image references to use correct naming

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -25,19 +25,23 @@ jobs:

       matrix:
         include:
-          - name: agentic-flow

+            image: agentic-flow
